narrative:
59 Ohio House district has 82,575 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.8%, a clear Democratic lean of 8.4 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +5.8% D−R vs +14.5% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
